arts.ttl: New York City FC Fire Coach Nick Cushing After MLS Cup Playoff Defeat
arts.sum: NYCFC fired Nick Cushing after the Pigeons failed to get past New York Red Bulls in the MLS playoffs.

arts.ttl: Cushing leaves New York City amid Arsenal links
arts.sum: New York City head coach Nick Cushing departs the club amid interest from Women's Super League club Arsenal.
